core_model.structure_summary: Minimization of the asymptotic convergence factor (spectral radius) of an affine fixed-point iteration over its penalty and relaxation parameters, where the iteration matrix depends on those parameters through resolvent expressions of two symmetric operators.

variables.meaning: iterate vector converging to the fixed point of an affine map
penalty and relaxation parameters tuning the iteration matrix
spectral radius / worst-case contraction factor to be minimized
eigenvalues of the parameter-dependent iteration operator built from resolvents of two symmetric operators

deterministic_skeleton.summary: An affine fixed-point iteration whose convergence is governed by the spectral radius of its linear part, with a quadratic objective defining the fixed point.

notes: Two intertwined objects: the affine linear iteration u^{k+1}=(I+alphaQ)u^k+c (an ADMM/relaxed-ADMM solver of a quadratic problem) and the outer optimization that minimizes its convergence factor over (theta,alpha). Chose the outer parameter-optimization of a linear fixed-point iteration as core since the paper's results are the closed-form optimal parameters; skeleton is the bare linear fixed-point iteration. linearity marked mixed: iteration is affine/linear, but the objective in the parameters (spectral radius) is nonlinear.
